title: Israel says it ‘eliminated’ two Hamas and Islamic Jihad operatives tied to major funding network

snapshot.title: Israel says it ‘eliminated’ two Hamas and Islamic Jihad operatives tied to major funding network
snapshot.description: DUBAI: The Israeli ​military said on Sunday that they “eliminated” Hussein Qadra and ‌Mohammed ‌Farra, operatives ​in ‌the ⁠military ​wings of ⁠Hamas and Islamic Jihad. Qadra, who headed ⁠the ‌network with ‌Farra, ​acted ‌under ‌Hamas leadership and facilitated the transfer ‌of more than half a billion ⁠shekels ⁠to Hamas, according to an Israeli military X post.
snapshot.author: Reuters
snapshot.pageTitle: Israel says it ‘eliminated’ two Hamas and Islamic Jihad operatives tied to major funding network | Arab News
